title: MineBrawl
description: Minecraft mod based on Brawl Stars
body:
Do you want to see your favorite Brawl Stars characters in Minecraft? Now, you can. I created this mod for those type of people, who wants play Brawl Stars in other games! There are now several brawlers in this mod and each one has their somewhat usability.

## Features ✅
- New mobs (brawlers)
- Entire new set of armor and tools
- Brand new biomes
- New blocks
- New weapons
- and more...

## Compability 🧱
This mod is only supported on Neoforge, Forge and few Fabric versions. Doesn't need any more mods to run. Both server and client needs to have this mod installed.

## Notes 📑
This mod is new and small, but i will be adding new things each few weeks.
Mod is also available on CurseForge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minebrawl](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minebrawl)
I will make wiki page at 5k total downloads downloads
THIS PROJECT IS NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH SUPERCELL
### _Random notes 📑_
_🎶_
